{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205460781F45DA753B574D1C291"}"},"total":2904},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7548255920284664638","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"火影篇总体来说还行，较为平淡类似于那种修仙大拿的养老生活，结局完结的有点仓促，看得出来作者不怎么会写了，不过也确实因为连作者自己都说笔力下降了[捂脸]，不过新人作者能写成这样是很牛逼的了，推荐的话还行，喜欢那种平平淡淡的可以看，不喜欢的建议看到海贼篇就可以宣布完结了[捂脸]然后再去看最后一篇的完结感言就差不多了[捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757468549,"group_id":"7315325110791965758","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"330324864926861"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7315325110791965758","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"720"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读25小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":89335,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7547949933866124094","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书算是一本清流了，他是真真正正写出了一个主角的改变，是真的写得挺不错的，我甚至觉得他9.2低了，因为他是真的写得很好我无法描述的那种好，剧情处理很好，文笔也很好，而且能力设定上也基本上没什么差，虽然主角那个战力看着有点怪怪的，但其实仔细想就会发现没错，因为海贼其实也就一个中下的世界，你要让他和修仙的比那绝对是比不了的，所以没啥问题，当然这还是有一点点小问题的不过影响不怎么大，有点缺字，还有多字，不过影响不怎么大，作者文笔也很好，结局也不错的，因为是同人，要的就是创新，只要不太离谱就没事儿。

以上是我看完海贼篇章的评价，因为我不知道后面的世界是什么样的，也还没看，所以我这篇评价只对于海贼篇"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757396360,"group_id":"7315325110791965758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没有哪本书是完美的，就像伴侣一样要去认识，适合你的才是好的","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6mVU7wiONzP2cXH5Pds/Ag=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/21cbb8dde9de45e0a71a49cd568617ef~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710471&x-signature=Aur1DaMHOWum0%2FHLWW4BDpWlUgg%3D","user_id":"330324864926861","user_name":"我睁眼世界就亮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"330324864926861","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7315325110791965758","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+海军阵营+轻松+半无敌+有趣，请耐心观看，不会南柯一梦。】

一场意外让墨星辰来到了海贼世界，本想安安静静的修真，做一个乐子人，弥补一下心中的遗憾。

没想到的是，在罗杰处刑之日，他刚开启了大海贼时代，便被卡普用铁拳带进了海军。

从此过上了朝九晚五请假旅游的日子，直到顶上战役……

艾斯：“墨叔，我想活下去！”

墨星辰：“闭嘴，那是罗宾的台词！”


（海贼篇已完结可放心开宰，第二世界火影正在进行中！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6231e4cbbe2df96d151646bf6c93df49","author":"虫二居士","author_id":"","book_id":"7315325110791965758","book_name":"从海贼开始，修真的我吊打一切！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#180808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":833,"name":"海贼王","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=833&name=海贼王&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7315325227397825086","read_count":"68487","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1258036"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"590","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,海贼,无敌,同人,搞笑轻松,海贼王,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e18a66dbbc860c6a2e400252428e2a71~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779313567&x-signature=SaZWD%2BHABowRPsu0kk34nMI5NM8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2538107237565997","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"401"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205460781F45DA753B574D1C291"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":55205,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9991},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7336759948116345624","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"新书分数低了点，但是把人情世故写的挺好，文笔也比较流畅，比那些9分的书要写的好多了，很久没遇到可以笑着看的书了，没特意去描写人物，战斗也言简意赅，看着很舒适，日常语句也轻松写意，偶尔有一点名字的错误，但是无伤大雅，不无脑，就是章节目前太少了，感觉不够看，本来只是想着反正一百章以内，根本没抱希望看的，随便看几章就换了，没想到居然有惊喜","text_exts":[{"e":15,"s":11,"text":"人情世故","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E6%83%85%E4%B8%96%E6%95%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177412956774D1C291%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227336759948116345624%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227315325110791965758%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E6%83%85%E4%B8%96%E6%95%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708224288,"group_id":"7315325110791965758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyoz6qGAu5R+1b8OgikpooU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1487693b13f e400252428e2a71~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779313567&x-signature=SaZWD%2BHABowRPsu0kk34nMI5NM8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2538107237565997","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205460781F45DA753B574D1C291"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":35,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5474,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7114,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":48743},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1708234789,"author_reply_time":1708234784,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7358125036472976190","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很严谨，这应该就是这本书分高的原因了，不降智，有依据。希望别后宫，其实没女主也是挺好看的，现在无论电影电视剧还是小说，都有感情线，真的有点审美疲劳了[笑哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713200588,"group_id":"7315325110791965758","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2919931037097848"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7315325110791965758","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"35"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5461,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7358127167630885694","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好的，唯一可惜的就是有点黑赤犬，个人还是挺喜欢赤犬的，虽然杀了艾斯，但军人哪有不杀人的，更何况还是为了自己的信念。虽然达不到神作，但是一本值得推荐的同人。轻松欢快风。太要求内涵的读者可以撤了[笑哭]值的点赞的是，作者的三观真的很正！（不像一些小说，计较赏金，计较军功。计较那计较这的，受点委屈就开始反社会）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713200299,"group_id":"7315325110791965758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Ej3TLuq0unIQjSFsjw6ikZNxNDKNoXkZzmgj1VhzY2","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/79f44fd0176842249ab3185fce49f838~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703824&x-signature=mF26SC6o%2Fw0AFzN%2BR4UgPUki49M%3D","user_id":"2919931037097848","user_name":"海軍★卡卡西"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2919931037097848","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7315325110791965758","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+海军阵营+轻松+半无敌+有趣，请耐心观看，不会南柯一梦。】
